response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong staff-level software engineering expertise with 27 years of experience and meets the educational requirements (Bachelor's CS + 8+ years), the role requires specialized hardware architecture expertise including SoC/IP modeling, GPU performance analysis, and deep neural network optimization—areas entirely absent from his software-focused career. His background is generalist full-stack development (web, GIS, microservices) rather than the hardware-system optimization and AI accelerator performance profiling this Principal-level position demands.
strengths: 27+ years of software engineering experience with demonstrated system-level performance optimization and low-latency infrastructure work
Strong technical foundation across multiple languages and domains, with proven ability to design complex distributed systems
Staff-level engineering maturity with infrastructure, DevOps, and cross-functional collaboration experience
concerns: No hardware architecture, SoC modeling, or IP design background—entire career is software-focused (web, mobile, GIS, microservices)
Lacks specialized AI/deep-learning workload optimization expertise; recent 'AI-agent infrastructure' work appears to involve LLM tooling rather than neural network inference optimization
No evidence of GPU architecture analysis, SIMD/MIMD optimization, or hardware-software co-design at the systems level required for this principal-level role

key_factors.factor: Strong software engineering and system design fundamentals
